# Keyboard Shortcuts

RadKit supports keyboard shortcuts at two levels: browser-wide shortcuts for starting captures and editor shortcuts for annotating.

## Capture Shortcuts

These shortcuts work from any browser tab without opening the popup.

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| **Alt+S** | Capture the visible viewport |
| **Alt+D** | Open the screen or window picker |

## Area Selection Shortcuts

These shortcuts are available while the area selection overlay is displayed.

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| **Enter** | Confirm the selection |
| **Escape** | Cancel the selection |

## Editor Shortcuts

These shortcuts are available inside the annotation editor.

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| **Ctrl+Z** / **Cmd+Z** | Undo |
| **Ctrl+Shift+Z** / **Cmd+Shift+Z** | Redo |
| **Delete** / **Backspace** | Delete the selected element |

### Tool Shortcuts

Press a letter key to switch to the corresponding tool.

| Key | Tool |
|-----|------|
| **C** | Crop |
| **P** | Pencil |
| **L** | Line |
| **A** | Arrow |
| **R** | Rectangle |
| **O** | Circle |
| **T** | Text |
| **B** | Blur |
